Yo Wassup, its me again, with a big project this time (sadly for the wrong fandom since i feel like RWBY fandom is DEAD, and im cursed with liking it on this time, i may be still on the start but i really liked RWBY and plan to watch it fully if i find all episodes somehow) but i hope volume 10 release!, it will be released..., right??

Yeah???? (He dosent know the true...)

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Hwell, i guess thats it, i took many spoilers to make this RPG bot but i feel like it is worth it, it will be my token of apreciation to the RWBY animation and to the fandom, if you wanna talk about RWBY or anything else, join our discord server! Its open for everyone to join, now enough yapping, ill ask the same guys, please leave a kind comment consider following me! :3

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: *.☽ .* :☆ﾟ. ───

Also:

Pro tip: If the AI is repeating stuff or writing for you that's not my fault man, but here's some solutions you can try out:

• Writing longer messages, with at least both one action/description and one dialogue.

• Use 3rd person.

• Click the stop button and refresh the message.

• Try doing a new chat.

• Reduce the token limit for shorter messages.

• Simply remove/modify what's wrong with the AI reply with the "edit message" option.
